creator: shaun@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

There seems to be a bug in bsd.port.mk that prevents this port 
from fetching; I haven't quite worked out what the problem is, 
though: 

charon% make fetch DISTDIR=/tmp 
=> patch-1.5.16.rr.compressed.gz doesn't seem to exist in /tmp/mutt. 
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.mutt.org.ua/download/mutt-1.5.16/. 
fetch: 10110: No such file or directory 
patch-1.5.16.rr.compressed.gz                 100% of    9 kB 9302  Bps 
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www2.mutt.org.ua/download/mutt-1.5.16/. 
fetch: 10110: No such file or directory 
fetch: http://www2.mutt.org.ua/download/mutt-1.5.16/patch-1.5.16.rr.compressed.gz: Requested Range Not Satisfiable 
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www3.mutt.org.ua/download/mutt-1.5.16/. 
fetch: 10110: No such file or directory 
fetch: http://www3.mutt.org.ua/download/mutt-1.5.16/patch-1.5.16.rr.compressed.gz: Requested Range Not Satisfiable 
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.mutt.org.ua/pub/mutt/mutt-1.5.16/. 
fetch: 10110: No such file or directory 
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp3.mutt.org.ua/pub/mutt/mutt-1.5.16/. 
fetch: 10110: No such file or directory 
fetch: patch-1.5.16.rr.compressed.gz: local modification time does not match remote 
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/mutt/. 
fetch: 10110: No such file or directory 
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/mutt/patch-1.5.16.rr.compressed.gz: File unavailable (e.g 
., file not found, no access) 
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this 
=> port manually into /tmp/mutt and try again. 
*** Error code 1 

Stop in /tmp/cports/ports/mail/mutt-devel.
